plain_problem: Reduce cloud hosting cost without hurting reliability.
root_requirement: lower recurring cost while preserving uptime and performance

branches.query: logs, docs, and code paths that show repeated expensive work
large files, cold data, duplicate uploads, and storage class options
idle resources, unused services, stale deployments, and scheduled shutdown opportunities
credits, committed-use discounts, cheaper tiers, and pricing model changes

pruning_rules: source must be enabled or public
candidate must stay within token budget
candidate must require user review before action
